task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a Value Chain diagram with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an EdrawMax canvas displaying a Porter's Value Chain structure (containing 'Support Activities' and 'Primary Activities') and a title reading 'EcoTech Electronics Value Chain Analysis' or 'EcoTech Electronics'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Support Activities are populated with the required text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the following text within the top/support sections of the diagram: 'Cloud-based ERP', 'STEM recruiting', 'IoT Patent', and 'Sustainable silicon'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Primary Activities are populated with the required text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the following text within the bottom/primary sections of the diagram: 'JIT Component', 'Robotic Assembly', 'Global Distribution', 'Direct-to-Consumer', and 'Chatbot Support'.

task_completion.description: Verify the project is saved as an .eddx file in the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog, the EdrawMax window title bar, or a file manager window showing 'ecotech_value_chain.eddx' located in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the diagram is exported as a .png image in the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Export' dialog, an export success notification, or a file manager window showing 'ecotech_value_chain.png' located in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Wondershare EdrawMax graphical user interface to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax application window, ribbon, and shape libraries should be visible in the screenshots. The agent should not be using a text editor or terminal to write XML/EDDX code.

integrity.description: Verify that the diagram is built using actual editable shapes rather than a pasted static image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for selection handles around shapes, active text cursors inside shapes, or interactions with the shape library/formatting menus.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to generate the output files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show Python scripts or shell commands being executed to directly create or move 'ecotech_value_chain.eddx' or 'ecotech_value_chain.png'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected EDDX path: /home/ga/Documents/ecotech_value_chain.eddx. Expected PNG path: /home/ga/Documents/ecotech_value_chain.png. Required strings in the diagram: 'EcoTech Electronics', 'Cloud-based ERP', 'STEM recruiting', 'IoT Patent', 'Sustainable silicon', 'JIT Component', 'Robotic Assembly', 'Global Distribution', 'Direct-to-Consumer', 'Chatbot Support'. Required template indicators: 'Firm Infrastructure', 'Inbound Logistics', 'Support Activities', 'Primary Activities'.
